11 #ifndef ARCANEDEMO_PATCH_H
12 #define ARCANEDEMO_PATCH_H
13 
14 
15 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
16 #include "arcane/VariableTypes.h"
17 #include <arcane/IMesh.h>
18 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
19 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
20 
21 
22 #include "arcane/IItemFamily.h"
23 #include <arcane/mesh/NodeFamily.h>
24 #include <arcane/mesh/FaceFamily.h>
25 
26 
27 
28 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 using namespace Arcane;
30 
31 class Patch
32 {
33 
34 public :
35 
36  class Modifier
37  {
38  public:
39 
40  Modifier(Patch& patch)
41  : m_patch(patch) {}
42 
43  //void createPatch(Arcane::CellGroup coarse_cells);
44 
45  private:
46 
47  Patch& m_patch;
48 
49  };
50 
51 
52  Patch(ITraceMng * trace_mng,
53  Arcane::IMesh* coarse_mesh,
54  const ItemInternalList& coarse_cellsInternal,
55  IntegerConstArrayView limiters,
56  IntegerConstArrayView axis_cells_nb)
57  : m_trace_mng(trace_mng)
58  , m_coarse_mesh(coarse_mesh)
59  , m_mesh(nullptr)
60  , m_coarse_cellsInternal(coarse_cellsInternal)
61  , m_limiters(limiters)
62  {
63  if(m_coarse_mesh == nullptr)
64  m_trace_mng->error()<<"Patch constructor : Coarse mesh not defined !";
65 
66 
67  _extractCellIds(axis_cells_nb);
68  m_global_id = 0; // global id is defined when patch is settled
69  }
70 
71  virtual ~Patch() {}
72 
73 
74  void setMesh(Arcane::IMesh* mesh)
75  {
76  m_mesh = mesh;
77  }
78 
79  static Patch::Modifier modifier();
80 
81  Arcane::IMesh* mesh() const { return m_mesh; }
82 
83  const IntegerConstArrayView limiters(){
84  return m_limiters;
85  }
86 
87  const IntegerConstArrayView coarseCellsLocalIds(){
88  return m_coarse_cells_local_ids;
89  }
90 
91  const Int64UniqueArray coarseCellsUniqueIds(){ //because of the need of the function itemsUniqueIdToLocalId
92  return m_coarse_cells_unique_ids;
93  }
94 
95  const Cell coarseCell(const Integer& id){
96  return m_coarse_cellsInternal[id];
97  }
98 
99  void computeMaxLength(Integer & max_length, Integer & axis_id);
100 
101  void updateCurrentToNewId(IMesh* new_mesh);
102 
103  void updateCommunicationData();
104 
105  void updateChildToParentFaceIds();
106 
107  Integer getCellsNumber();
108 
109  void setGlobalId(const Integer& id){
110  m_global_id = id;
111  }
112 
113  const Integer globalId(){
114  return m_global_id;
115  }
116 
117  Int32UniqueArray facesChildToCurrentLId() const{
118  return m_faces_child_to_parent_local_id;
119  }
120 
121  Int32UniqueArray cellsNewToCurrentLId() const{
122  return m_cells_new_to_current_local_id;
123  }
124 
125  Int32UniqueArray cellsCurrentToNewLId() const {
126  return m_cells_current_to_new_local_id;
127  }
128 
129  void print();
130 
131 protected:
132 
133  void _extractCellIds(IntegerConstArrayView axis_cells_nb);
134 
135 
136 public:
137 
138  ITraceMng* m_trace_mng;
139 
140  Arcane::IMesh* m_coarse_mesh;
141 
142  Arcane::IMesh* m_mesh;
143 
144  ItemInternalList m_coarse_cellsInternal;
145 
146  // x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max, z_min, z_max
147  IntegerSharedArray m_limiters; // size is known in advance, std::array ?
148 
149  Int32UniqueArray m_cells_current_to_new_local_id;
150 
151  Int32UniqueArray m_cells_new_to_current_local_id;
152 
153  Int32UniqueArray m_faces_current_to_new_local_id;
154 
155  Int32UniqueArray m_faces_new_to_current_local_id;
156 
157  Int32UniqueArray m_faces_child_to_parent_local_id;
158 
159  IntegerUniqueArray m_coarse_cells_local_ids; //maybe IntegerSharedArray ?
160 
161  Int64UniqueArray m_coarse_cells_unique_ids;// Int64 needed by the function itemsUniqueIdToLocalId
162 
163  Integer m_coarse_cells_nb;
164 
165  Integer m_global_id;
166 
167  friend class Modifier;
168 
169 
170 
171 };
